topPlaces.name: Barlamunda
topPlaces.description: Barlamunda is a tribal village in Koraput district, Odisha, India. It has no electricity, running water or road access, despite being promised rudimentary facilities (beginning with a road) under the National Rural Employment Guarantee Scheme.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Subai Jain temples?
faq.a: The best time to visit Subai Jain temples is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Subai Jain temples?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Visakhapatnam Airport (108 km) and the nearest railway station is Visakhapatnam Junction (111 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Subai Jain temples?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Subai Jain temples at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Subai Jain temples?
faq.a: Stays in Subai Jain temples start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.
